mode.description: observe: only log activity without blocking. enforce: full credit gate with blocking.

initialCredits.description: Credits given to new users on first interaction

triggerHashtags.description: Hashtags that trigger credit-gated bot interaction

triggerCommands.description: Commands that trigger credit-gated bot interaction

adminUsers.description: User IDs that bypass credit checks and can manage credits

fallbackModel.description: Model to use when user has no credits (minimizes token cost)

evaluateContributions.description: Whether the bot should evaluate user contributions and award credits

contributionReward.description: Credits awarded for a valuable contribution

contributionMinLength.description: Minimum message length (chars) to evaluate for contribution rewards. Avoids wasting tokens on short messages.

cooldownSeconds.description: Minimum seconds between bot interactions per user. 0 = no cooldown. This is a hard gate independent of LLM.
